message:
test(core): add property-based tests for shadow mode evaluator and tx
observability, tailer benchmarks, and proptest regression seeds

Property-based tests (proptest):

- proptest_shadow_mode_evaluator.rs (837 lines): Covers fidelity
  scoring, dispatch rate, agent match rate, divergence tracking,
  history bounding, metrics accumulation, serde roundtrip, warmup
  detection, and configuration toggles for the shadow-mode evaluator
  (ft-1i2ge.6.3). Gated behind feature="subprocess-bridge".

- proptest_tx_observability.rs (656 lines): Covers event taxonomy,
  timeline construction, redaction policies, plan/ledger snapshots,
  forensic bundles, and reason code conventions for the tx
  observability module (ft-1i2ge.8.9). Gated behind
  feature="subprocess-bridge".

- proptest_rate_limit_tracker.proptest-regressions: Saved shrunk
  failure seed (cc 0d4ea73...) for rate limit tracker edge case
  with ClaudeCode events. Checked in per proptest best practice so
  all developers benefit from the saved regression case.

Benchmarks (criterion):

- benches/tailer.rs (266 lines): Perf harness for tailer capture
  throughput supporting ft-124z4. Benchmarks single-pane capture
  rounds at varying payload sizes, concurrent capture rounds with
  bounded max_concurrent, two-phase capture-event channel
  reserve/send/recv path, and timeout wrapper overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 0d4ea733e6cf4cd4901061d67a8ccd0bdd75fbc27cff932da619ad02c085a7d1 # shrinks to events = [(0, ClaudeCode)]
